name: Gliss
description: Capacitive touch-strip controller built on Bela Trill. Four modes (Control, Record, Signal, Notes) turn finger position and pressure into two CV/gate outputs. Open-source firmware; v2 adds 1U orientation and dual-strip splits.

controls.name: Touch Strip
controls.description: High-resolution capacitive strip sensing position and touch size (pressure). Single-touch in most modes; split into two halves in dual sub-modes.
controls.detail: sub-millimetre resolution · position + size · LED array mirrors touch

controls.name: Mode button
controls.description: Short press cycles the four modes (Control / Record / Signal / Notes). Long press enters per-mode settings: output ranges, latching, dual split, wavetable.
controls.detail: short: mode cycle · long: settings · LED colour per mode

controls.name: Output range presets
controls.description: Settings menu selects voltage range for each output. Uni/bipolar options per mode. Calibrated per jack.

inputs.name: IN
inputs.description: Signal/CV input. In Signal mode it is the signal being processed; in Record mode it re-triggers playback; in Notes mode it acts as clock for step-sequencer use.

outputs.name: OUT TOP
outputs.description: Primary CV. Follows finger position in Control/Notes, scaled recorded gesture in Record, processed input in Signal. Range configurable per mode.

outputs.name: OUT BOTTOM
outputs.description: Secondary output. Touch size in Control, gate/env in Record, envelope-of-input in Signal, gate in Notes. Can be a trigger on gesture start/end.

behaviors.name: Control mode
behaviors.description: Two-dimensional performance controller. Top output = position, bottom = touch size (pressure). Latching option holds last value on release. Dual split turns the strip into two independent sliders.

behaviors.name: Record mode
behaviors.description: Records a gesture up to 75 seconds. On release, loops automatically as a custom LFO. IN jack re-triggers playback for envelope use. Wavetable setting plays the gesture at audio rate tracked by V/oct at IN.

behaviors.name: Signal mode
behaviors.description: Touch strip visualises incoming signal as a VU-meter and performatively scales, offsets, clips and smooths it. Top output = processed signal, bottom = envelope follower of IN.

behaviors.name: Notes mode
behaviors.description: Five user-tuned voltages played as a touch keyboard. With clock at IN becomes a 5-step sequencer with per-step mute/skip/hold. Pressure adds expressive modulation to bottom output.

behaviors.name: Dual sub-modes
behaviors.description: Splits strip in half for two independent gestures. Control dual = two sliders; Record dual = two 37.5 s loops on top and bottom outs; Notes dual = two zones each with their own notes.

behaviors.name: Open-source firmware v2
behaviors.description: v2 (Oct 2024) adds 1U panel orientation, gesture-sync clock outputs, refined calibration, and wavetable mode. Flashable via browser; all code on GitHub for user mods.

patchIdeas.name: Expressive touch macro
patchIdeas.patch: Control mode · position → filter cutoff · pressure → resonance · single finger sculpts timbre in one gesture · latching OFF so envelope falls on release
patchIdeas.diagram:
Gliss:
* Mode: Control · Latching: OFF

- Gliss (OUT TOP) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Gliss (OUT BOTTOM) >> Filter (Resonance)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Hand-drawn LFO
patchIdeas.patch: Record mode · draw a 10-second gesture · loops as custom LFO modulating pitch · re-draw live to mutate the shape · pairs beautifully with slow drones
patchIdeas.diagram:
Gliss:
* Mode: Record · Loop: ON

- Gliss (OUT TOP) >> VCO (FM)
- Gliss (OUT BOTTOM) >> VCA (CV) // envelope of gesture
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Gesture envelope
patchIdeas.patch: Record mode · draw an ADSR-shaped envelope once · IN receives gate from sequencer · plays gesture as envelope per note · drawable shape replaces a traditional EG
patchIdeas.diagram:
Gliss:
* Mode: Record · Trigger: IN

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Gate) g> Gliss (IN)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Gliss (OUT TOP) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: CV scaler / clipper
patchIdeas.patch: Signal mode · chaotic source into IN · touch strip live-scales + clips the voltage · bottom output envelope follows · tame a wild LFO in real time
patchIdeas.diagram:
Gliss:
* Mode: Signal

Chaos LFO:

- Chaos LFO (Out) >> Gliss (IN)
- Gliss (OUT TOP) >> Filter (Cutoff) // tamed
- Gliss (OUT BOTTOM) >> VCA (CV) // env follower

patchIdeas.name: Five-note touch keyboard
patchIdeas.patch: Notes mode · tune five zones to a pentatonic scale · pressure → velocity on bottom out · ideal for performing melodies over a drone
patchIdeas.diagram:
Gliss:
* Mode: Notes · 5 zones = pentatonic

- Gliss (OUT TOP) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Gliss (OUT BOTTOM) >> VCA (CV) // velocity
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Clocked 5-step sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: Notes mode · clock at IN advances a 5-step pattern · hold zones to mute/skip/hold steps · live-edit sequence by touching the strip while it runs
patchIdeas.diagram:
Gliss:
* Mode: Notes · clock at IN = 5-step seq

Clock:

- Clock (Out) c> Gliss (IN)
- Gliss (OUT TOP) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Gliss (OUT BOTTOM) g> Envelope (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Wavetable at audio rate
patchIdeas.patch: Record mode · wavetable setting ON · draw a waveform shape · feed V/oct sequence to IN · Gliss becomes a drawable oscillator tracked across octaves
patchIdeas.diagram:
Gliss:
* Mode: Record · Wavetable: ON

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Gliss (IN)
- Gliss (OUT TOP) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Dual-mode two-slider mixer
patchIdeas.patch: Control dual ON · top half of strip → VCA A · bottom half → VCA B · crossfade two sources with one finger per side · hands-on mixer
patchIdeas.diagram:
Gliss:
* Mode: Control · Dual: ON

- Gliss (OUT TOP) >> VCA A (CV) // top half of strip
- Gliss (OUT BOTTOM) >> VCA B (CV) // bottom half
- Source A (Out) -> VCA A (In)
- Source B (Out) -> VCA B (In)
